#  Project Management Report - RFIs 
#### Summary
As part of the Procore Analytics Project Management Report, the RFIs report page includes basic information about all RFIs for every project.
#### Sample Report Page
![Procore Analytics Rfis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/83eca34f356721f66b2148b2729cde94/cd63bcbbaf8dd2f66605566932edff62/procore-analytics-rfis.png?fm=webp)
_This sample report page was created using mock data for demonstration purposes only._
